description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with a platform and stair access on one side, set on a rectangular concrete base. The ramp features smooth, curved surfaces for skating, with black side panels adorned with colorful graffiti art, including a skull motif and bold lettering. Metal railings run along the top edges of the ramp and the platform, providing safety for users. The stairway leads up to a raised platform, which serves as a starting point for skaters. The structure is robust and designed for heavy use, typical of urban skate parks. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, blending street art with practical play elements.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with graffiti-decorated black side panels, metal railings, and a stair-accessed platform. Designed for skating, it features smooth curves and urban street art.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main half-pipe, graffiti art, and the stairway leading to the raised platform on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full curvature of the half-pipe and the vertical stairway with graffiti on the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ramp, the platform, and the continuation of the graffiti art.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the half-pipe's interior, the platform, and the stairway from a different angle.
attribute_playground_equipment_type: skate ramp (half-pipe) with platform and stairs
